title: Emergency: board not loading in two different countries
excerpt: Help - my colleague and I are in two different countries, and Monday is down for both of us. What’s happening??

posts.author: BonnieW (Bonnie Woolley)
posts.cookedHtml: Help - my colleague and I are in two different countries, and Monday is down for both of us. What’s happening??

posts.author: BonnieW (Bonnie Woolley)
posts.cookedHtml: Downdetector says there have been 52 reports in the past 15 minutes or so, it’s obviously a server problem… Hope everything is ok!

posts.author: Arnaud_ATV44 (Arnaud JANC)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
same here, France, trouble with loading Boards, and when it comes, data from this morning is not there anymore …
Losing data is worse case !! What’s happening !!??

Data seems to be back …

posts.author: BonnieW (Bonnie Woolley)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, we’re back up too… Scary moment!
